name: 法律案件材料梳理与时间线
name_en: Legal case materials review and timeline

observable_attributes.reading_strategy: file_open order and coverage (chronological vs. by file type vs. by perceived importance); whether mp3/image files are examined or skipped
observable_attributes.output_detail: output file length and granularity; whether individual case details are extracted vs. only high-level themes
observable_attributes.output_structure: organization of output (narrative vs. per-case breakdown vs. timeline vs. table)
observable_attributes.tone: formality level in writing (legal-professional vs. casual summary)

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹包含一位法律工作者的案件相关材料，包括案件报告、法律法规、客户邮件、日历安排、聊天记录和语音备忘录。请阅读并理解这些材料，写一份案件概要文件，说明：涉及哪些案件/客户？目前进展到什么阶段？有哪些关键时间节点？保存在当前目录下。
prompt_en: This folder contains case-related materials for a legal professional, including case reports, statutes, client emails, calendar entries, chat logs, and voice memos. Read and understand these materials, then write a case summary file covering: Which cases/clients are involved? What stage is each at? What are the key dates and deadlines? Save it in the current directory.
behavioral_freedom: Reading order: by file type (docx first, then emails) vs. alphabetical vs. by date vs. exploratory browsing
Whether to attempt reading non-text files (mp3, png) or skip them
Output format: chronological timeline vs. per-case sections vs. client-centric grouping
Level of legal detail: cite specific statutes vs. general description
Whether to flag gaps or missing information in the materials
Whether to separate personal vs. professional materials in the summary
